channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Memorial Day Dyson Vacuum Deals: V15 Detect, Gen5Detect, PencilVac On Sale
item.description: Wishing for your very own Dyson vacuum? Don’t miss these vacuum deals happening over the holiday weekend.

item.title: Cette liseuse Vivlio fait de l’ombre à la Kindle avec une promo qui tombe à pic pour la fête des mères
item.description: Si vous cherchez un cadeau pour la Fête des mères, la Vivlio Light Zen est en promo à 89 euros au lieu de 109 euros sur E.Leclerc.

item.title: How to watch Barcelona vs Lyon: Live Streams, TV Schedule and Preview for Women’s Champions League final
item.description: All the ways to watch Barcelona vs Lyon live streams online – including for FREE – in the Women's Champions League final at Ullevaal Stadion in Oslo.

item.title: Hanging out in my favorite virtual coffee shop in Tokyo
item.description: Finding a cafe that fits you can be a revelatory experience. For me at least, there are few places outside of my house that I can truly feel comfortable in. I'm lucky enough to have two options in walking distance: a coffee shop that's bright, airy, and full of art, and another that doubles as […]

item.title: Elon Musk has given up on solar power (on Earth)
item.description: Elon Muks's xAI has gone all in on natural gas, while SpaceX is obsessed with orbital data centers. What happened to the "solar-electric economy" he promised?

item.title: The online banking security paradox: why VPN protection is a problem (and how to solve it)
item.description: From banking to delivery apps — split tunneling allows you to bridge safety and speed through purpose-built, encrypted browsing

item.title: Vought Rising: everything we know so far about The Boys spin-off show (release window, trailer, cast, plot, and more)
item.description: Here's what we know so far about Vought Rising, which is billed as a prequel to The Boys.

item.title: The 25 best Memorial Day TV deals that I personally recommend — expert picks on 4K, QLED, and OLED TVs from $149.99
item.description: I'm rounding up today's 25 best Memorial Day TV deals that I recommend buying, including up to $1,400 off best-rated 4K, QLED, and OLED TVs.

item.title: Anthropic says Mythos has already found more than 10,000 vulnerabilities
item.description: Anthropic has published an initial update about Project Glasswing, which it says has helped partners find bugs high and critical in severity.

item.title: Time to switch to Bing? Searching for words like 'disregard' or 'ignore' breaks AI Overviews in Google Search
item.description: It seems there's a bug inside AI Overviews, which is treating some search terms as commands for the AI.

item.title: Steam laisse en ligne un jeu raciste simulant l’esclavage : la France saisit l’Arcom, Valve reste silencieux
item.description: Le jeu Plantation Simulator reste sur Steam malgré les règles de la plateforme. La France saisit l'Arcom tandis que Valve n'a toujours pas réagi.

item.title: On a testé la Xiaomi Electric Scooter 6 Ultra, la trottinette électrique qui se prend pour la Xiaomi SU7 Ultra
item.description: Performante, confortable et avec un haut niveau technologique, la Xiaomi Electric Scooter 6 Ultra hausse le niveau sur le marché des trottinettes électriques, le tout à prix raisonnable, et qui pardonne les maigres défauts. Voici notre test complet.

item.title: I have a new go-to browser
item.description: Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 129, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, come on you Gunners, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.) This week, I've mostly been sick, which has meant nearly a full rewatch of Parks […]

item.title: Marshals: A Yellowstone Story season 2 — release window and everything we know so far about the Taylor Sheridan spinoff's return
item.description: Thankfully, Marshals: A Yellowstone Story season 2 was renewed before season 1 was even finished being released on CBS and Paramount+. Here's the latest on the Taylor Sheridan spinoff's return.

item.title: Hull City vs Middlesbrough live streams: How to watch EFL Championship play-off final from anywhere
item.description: All the ways to watch Hull City vs Middlesbrough live streams online and from anywhere, as the two sides contest the Championship play-off final at Wembley.
